coach.title: Chat
coach.name: Loggy
coach.workoutGenerationPrompt: I can help you Crear a personalized entrenamiento plan! Tell me about Tu goals, available equipment, and how many days per week you'd like to train.
coach.mealPlanPrompt: I can help you Crear a personalized meal plan for 3 days! Tell me about Tu preferences, allergies, or any specific foods you'd like to include.
coach.analyzeProgressPrompt: I'll analyze Tu recent workouts. Any remarks you'd like to tell me before I do?
coach.nutritionCheckPrompt: I'll review Tu nutrition for the last 7 days. Any remarks you'd like to Añadir before I do?
coach.trackMealPrompt: Tell me what you've eaten (you can even send a photo!), and I'll estimate the macros and track it for you.
coach.welcomeMessage: Hello. My name is Loggy, I am Tu AI Fitness Coach. I'm here to help you achieve Tu fitness goals, track Tu progreso, and provide personalized guidance. Feel free to ask me anything about workouts, nutrition, or Tu fitness journey!
coach.welcomeMessageExercise: Hello! I'm Loggy. I'm here to help you with Tu training, whether it's building a Nuevo entrenamiento plan, checking Tu form, or analyzing Tu progreso. What's on Tu training schedule today?
coach.welcomeMessageNutrition: Hi! I'm Loggy. I can help you stay on top of Tu nutrition by tracking Tu meals, estimating macros, and providing dietary insights. Tell me about Tu recent meals or ask me any nutrition questions!

insights.noNutritionLogs: I can't provide nutrition insights because you haven't tracked any meals in the past 7 days. Start logging Tu food to get personalized nutrition feedback!
insights.noWorkoutLogs: I can't provide entrenamiento insights because you haven't completed any workouts in the past 7 days. Get moving and I'll be ready to analyze Tu training!

errors.aiNotConfigured: AI features are not configured. Please Añadir a Gemini or OpenAI API key in ajustes.
errors.workoutGenerationFailed: Sorry, I couldn't generate a entrenamiento plan. Please try again.
errors.mealPlanGenerationFailed: Sorry, I couldn't generate a meal plan. Please try again.
errors.generalError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.progressInsightFailed: Could not analyze progreso. Try again later.
errors.nutritionInsightFailed: Could not check nutrition. Try again later.
errors.trackMealFailed: I couldn't estimate the macros for that meal. Could you describe it in more detail?
errors.filePickFailed: falló to pick file. Please try again.
errors.creditsExhausted: It looks like Tu AI credits have run out. Please check Tu API key or billing in ajustes.
errors.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before sending another message.

success.mealPlanGenerated: I've created a 3-day meal plan with {{count}} meals for you! 🥗 {{description}}
success.trackMealSuccess: I've tracked {{count}} ingredients for Tu meal: {{ingredients}}. Total: {{calories}} kcal.
success.trackMealReady: I've analyzed {{count}} meal(s): {{meals}} ({{calories}} kcal total). Tap a meal to review and log it!

aiInstructions.parseWorkouts: Parse the workouts and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.parseNutrition: Parse the nutrition datos and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.parseRetrospectiveNutrition: Parse the meals and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.generateWorkoutPlanWithHistory: Generate a entrenamiento plan based on this conversation.
aiInstructions.generateWorkoutPlanDefault: Generate a basic weekly entrenamiento plan (e.g. 3-day split).

chatMessages.title: Chat Messages
chatMessages.createMessageDesc: Añadir un nuevo mensaje al historial

menu.title: Opciones de chat
menu.clearHistoryDesc: Elimina todos los mensajes en este contexto de conversación.
menu.shareHistoryDesc: Exporta toda esta conversación como texto plano.

confirmClear.title: ¿Borrar historial de chat?
confirmClear.message: Esto eliminará permanentemente todos los mensajes en este contexto de conversación. Esto no se puede deshacer.

share.title: Chat con Loggy
share.noMessages: Aún no hay historial de chat para compartir.
share.failed: Error al compartir el historial de chat. Por favor, inténtalo de nuevo.

coach.disclaimer: La IA puede cometer errores. Por favor, verifica la información importante.

message.copyDesc: Copiar texto del mensaje al portapapeles
message.deleteDesc: Eliminar este mensaje de la conversación
